summary: Completed comprehensive frontend-only testing of MicroAgent AI workspace UI. All features tested successfully on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. No backend testing performed as this is a frontend-only design task.
passed_tests: Page loads at '/' with greeting 'Good afternoon, Riftyxso' and no console errors
Light premium theme applied correctly
Desktop sidebar: New/History/Projects/More items visible with labels and icons
Sidebar items clickable with active state changes (aria-current='page')
Sidebar collapse button: collapses from 86px to 68px (icon-only) and expands back
Avatar: green circle with 'R' in top-right corner
Avatar dropdown: opens menu with Riftyxso / Profile / Settings / Sign out
Prompt composer: typing into textarea works correctly
Send button: gray/disabled when empty, dark/enabled with text
Send button: clicking shows toast 'This is a design preview' and clears input
Enter key: sends message, shows toast, and clears input
Model selector: opens dropdown with 4 models (DeepSeek v4 Pro ⚡5, GPT-4.1 ⚡8, Claude 3.7 ⚡10, Gemini 2.5 ⚡6)
Model selector: selecting GPT-4.1 updates trigger label and credit badge to 8, shows toast
Auto Mode: clicking activates tinted state with 'Auto' label and toast 'Auto Mode on'
Auto Mode: clicking again deactivates and shows toast 'Auto Mode off / Back to GPT-4.1'
Web search icon: toggles active blue tint state (aria-pressed true/false)
Quick chips: all 5 chips visible (Research, Create, Analyse, Imagine, Solve)
Quick chips: clicking Research sets active highlighted state and changes placeholder to 'Research any topic — answers with sources'
Quick chips: clicking same chip again deselects and restores placeholder to 'Ask anything'
Attach button: visible and clickable
Hidden file input: exists with data-testid='prompt-composer-file-input' (real uploads not tested as per instructions)
Mobile (390x844): sidebar hidden, mobile bottom nav visible
Mobile bottom nav: New/History/Projects/More items visible
Mobile nav: clicking mobile-nav-history changes active state (aria-current='page')
Mobile: composer full width (358px, ~92% of viewport)
Mobile: quick chips wrap into multiple rows (90px height, 2 rows)
